description: Perform a Supervised Machine Learning land cover classification on the Landsat 4-band image located at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. Use vector data containers named 'Water_Train' and 'Veg_Train' for training data. Save the resulting classification product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/supervised_ml_map.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/supervised_ml_map.tif.
